buzzNote: notable pre-release coverage around Rupam Islam's Bengali rock soundtrack
summaryLine: Sole review frames Chaiti Ghoshal's debut as a hopeful redemption drama.
theRead: Critical coverage is thin so far, with Sangbad Pratidin among the few outlets to review Chaiti Ghoshal's directorial debut. It reads the film as a warm, hope-and-redemption story set across one neon-lit Kolkata day, anchored by Rituparna Sengupta and Rupam Islam's Bengali rock songs. No printed rating was accessible, and the shortage of other critic verdicts is the main caveat.
watchIf: Watch if you liked introspective, soulful Bengali dramas like Praktan or Belashuru.
